creator: shitman71@hotmail.com
text:
Using pkg install results in:

/compat/linux/sbin/ldconfig: File /lib/libGLESv2.so is empty, not checked.
/compat/linux/sbin/ldconfig: File /lib/libGLESv1_CM.so is empty, not checked.
/compat/linux/sbin/ldconfig: File /lib/libGLESv2.so.2 is empty, not checked.
/compat/linux/sbin/ldconfig: File /lib/libGLESv1_CM.so.1 is empty, not checked.
/compat/linux/sbin/ldconfig: File /lib/libEGL.so.1 is empty, not checked.
/compat/linux/sbin/ldconfig: File /lib/libEGL.so is empty, not checked.

Manually copying files to this location doesn't work. I can't run any games anymore and i doubt there is only games being affected by it.

Doesn't exist anymore:
/usr/local/share/wine/patch-nvidia.sh
